title: sterculia longifolia
intro: Sterculia longifolia, also known as the Elephant Apple, is a plant species belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Sterculia longifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
